TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_‘Bu_balung, title = ‘Bu_balung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/‘Bu_balung} }

S.FORM: 'Bu balung Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko 'Bu balung a niyaro', 147 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 394 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 76% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 299 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 24% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 95 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal72%, Amis2%, Truku1%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ʡb~b~vo~u~u b~b~vaɾo~u~uŋ itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u ʡb~b~vo~u~u b~b~vaɾo~u~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: 'Bu balung Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko 'Bu balung a niyaro', 147 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 394 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 76% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 299 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 24% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 95 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal72%, Amis2%, Truku1%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ʡb~b~vo~u~u b~b~vaɾo~u~uŋ itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u ʡb~b~vo~u~u b~b~vaɾo~u~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
